framework.name: Three-Pillar Responsible Autonomy Framework
framework.description: Sustainable autonomous system deployment requires: (1) Robust guardrails for safety/ethics, (2) Timely workforce upskilling/reskilling, (3) Purposeful deployments addressing societal needs through cross-sector collaboration.
framework.raw_quote: Three points remain key: Robust guardrails... Timely workforce upskilling and reskilling... Purposeful deployments.

source.title: Bringing AI into the physical world with autonomous systems | World Economic Forum
